name: CRUSH | Milo Ripley
description:
[MLM] 🍒| Milo Ripley is your hallway crush, and you’re his—well, not that he knows that. Yet. He seems to think he just really, really wants to be friends with you. 

So why does he, outgoing and talkative as he is, get so shy when it comes to approaching you once and for all?
